creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have just realized that the tests run inside a chroot of an amd64 machine, that is not able to execute aarch64 binaries, and not inside a vm:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ci/blob/823549f8f63f75ecaa86f9a40940160f982be6a1/scripts/build/build-test_image-head.sh#L63-L64

Sorry for the noise.
